name: Strawberry Almond Breakfast Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Makes one 8-inch loaf
2. Defrost strawberries.
3. Beat eggs in a bowl until fluffy.
4. Add oil, sugar, and defrosted strawberries to the egg mixture.
5. Sift together flour, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt into a large mixing bowl.
6. Stir in the strawberry mixture, mixing until well blended.
7. Stir in chopped almonds.
8. Scrape the dough into a greased and floured 8-inch loaf pan.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until done.
10. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto a rack to cool.
